titleStmt.title: SII 42.10: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 10. (A.R. No. B. 11 of 1953-54.) Ellanūru, Tadipatri Taluk, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone in front of the Buchchamma temple in Pātapēṭa, a suburb of Ellanūru.

The record is dated Śaka 1671, Krōdhi (wrong), Jyēshṭha, śu. 15 and 1668, Śubhakṛit (wrong), Kārttika, śu. 15. Irregular date. The second part dated Śaka 1668 should come first, followed by the one dated Śaka 1671.

Registers a gift of one tūmu of land to Kōṭa Buchaṁma (deity or individual) of Pātapēṭa by the Reḍḍis and Karaṇas of Kasanūru for worship and offerings of god Rāmaliṅgēśvara, newly installed; also registers another gift of a tūmu of land to the same deity on the latter date by the Reḍḍis and Karaṇas of Siṁhādripuram for a similar purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śa
ka va¨rṣaṁbulū
1671 Agunēṭi krō
dhi nāma sama(ṁva)tsara jē(jyē)
ṣṭa(ṣṭha) śudha(ddha) 15 lū
pātavē(pē)ṭadēvara kē(kō)ṭa
bucaṁmaku kana(sa ?)nū
ri reḍḍi ke(ka)raṇālu vrā
yiṁci Iccina bū(bhū)dā
na patrike(ka) māgrāma
ṁlō pātapēṭalō
nūtanaṁgā rāmaliṁ
gasvāmiki taḷige dī
pārādhanaku mānyaṁ
yistimi ganuka yicci
na vivaraṁ . śiṁ(siṁ)hyādri
pale(lle)dōvanu yēṭū
ri veṁkaṭa dāsari cēniki
tū¨rpuna yēṭūri ce
llaṁ cēśni(si)na cēnu staḷaṁ 71
Akṣarāla tūmeḍu
cēnu Iccināmu sarvamā
nyaṁgānu . mīputrapau
tra pāraṁpariyattaraṁ (paryaṁtaṁ) Ā
caṁdrā¨rkastāI(sthāyi)gānu A
nubhaviṁcukunēdi . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupā
lanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadatta
ṁniṣphalaṁ bhavēttu(t) .
As a continuation of line 30, there is another inscription which is transcribed below.

śālivāhana
śaka va¨rṣaṁbulu 1668 Agunēṭi
śubhakru(kṛ)tu nāma vatsara kā¨rttika
śu 15 lū velalūri pāta
pēṭa rāmaliṁggasvāmiki śihya(siṁhā)
dripuraṁ reḍḍi karaṇālū taḷige
dīpārādhanakugānu Ici(cci)na mā
nyaṁ pātapalli polimēra naṁdimā
ni cēni naḍumanu É1 cēnu Iccinā
mu . naḍipiṁccakuṁṭē kāśilō
gōvunu caṁpina pāpāna pōdurū(ru)
rāmaliṁgasvāmiki prītigā naidipāḷlanu baya
kralu .
Digital edition of SII 42.10 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
